shadows.name: hud-float
shadows.purpose: The overlay card and any panel floating over the user's screen.

shadows.name: stage-lift
shadows.purpose: The screenshot on the editor canvas — the one lit object.

shadows.name: toast
shadows.purpose: Transient notices like the error bar.

shadows.name: thumb
shadows.purpose: The draggable thumbnail inside the overlay.

motion.name: none-at-rest
motion.purpose: The current system has no transitions; interactions are instant. Any future transition: ~150ms, state-conveying only, respecting prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Focus Blue action button — Done/Copy/Save in the editor toolbar.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #4f8ef7; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #4f8ef7; border-radius: 6px; font: 400 12px -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 5px 10px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6aa2ff; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f8ef7; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Toolbar Button
components.description: Dark secondary control used across the editor toolbar; .active turns Focus Blue.
components.css: .ds-btn-toolbar { background: #3a3a3c; color: #ddd; border: 1px solid #4a4a4c; border-radius: 6px; font: 400 12px -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 5px 10px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-toolbar:hover { background: #48484a; } .ds-btn-toolbar:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f8ef7; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: HUD Button
components.description: The lightest affordance: 10% white over glass, used inside HUD panels and the overlay.
components.css: .ds-btn-hud { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); color: #eee; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); border-radius: 6px; font: 400 12px -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 5px 10px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-hud:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); } .ds-btn-hud:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f8ef7; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Glass HUD Panel
components.description: The signature material: translucent dark glass panel floating over the user's screen.
components.css: .ds-glass-panel { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(24, 24, 26, 0.92); color: #fff; font: 13px -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45); } .ds-glass-panel-btn { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font: inherit; padding: 6px 10px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-glass-panel-btn:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); }

components.name: History Card
components.description: Light-mode capture card in the History window: white surface, hairline border, dense actions.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e2e2e4; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: 220px; font-family: -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-thumb { aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; background: repeating-conic-gradient(#e8e8ea 0% 25%, #f4f4f6 0% 50%) 50% / 20px 20px; } .ds-card-meta { font-size: 11px; color: #888; padding: 6px 10px 0; } .ds-card-actions { display: flex; gap: 4px; padding: 8px 10px 10px; } .ds-card-actions button { flex: 1; font: 400 11px -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 5px 0; border: 1px solid #d0d0d2; border-radius: 6px; background: #fafafa; cursor: pointer; } .ds-card-actions button:hover { background: #eee; }

components.name: Color Swatch
components.description: Editor color-picker swatch; the active swatch gets a white ring.
components.css: .ds-swatch { display: inline-block; width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; margin-right: 4px; } .ds-swatch-active { border-color: #fff; }

components.name: Error Toast
components.description: Fixed bottom-center error bar; the only red surface in the app.
components.html: Export failed — the capture file is missing.
components.css: .ds-error-toast { display: inline-block; background: #d9342b; color: #fff; font: 400 13px -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); }

narrative.overview: Every surface in Screen for me is a lightweight heads-up display floating over the user's own work. Transient panels are translucent dark glass (#18181A at 85–92%); windowed surfaces are quiet macOS-native gray with the system font everywhere. The design's job is to keep the capture-to-share loop fast; nothing on screen may draw attention to itself instead of the screenshot. The system explicitly rejects Electron-app heaviness, feature-bloat pro-tool chrome, and startup-SaaS styling.
keyCharacteristics: Translucent dark glass panels for transient HUD surfaces; opaque native grays for windows
One accent blue (#4f8ef7), used only for primary actions and active state
System font stack at compact sizes (11–13px UI); no display or brand fonts
Flat within windows; soft large shadows only where a panel floats over the screen
Settings and History respect the OS light/dark preference; HUDs and the editor are always dark

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Focus Blue is the only decorative-adjacent color and it appears exclusively on primary actions, active tools, and selection state — never on labels, borders-at-rest, or backgrounds.

rules.name: The Glass Rule
rules.body: Transient surfaces (things that float over the user's screen) are translucent dark glass. Windowed surfaces are opaque native gray. Never mix the two materials on one surface.

rules.name: The Tabular Rule
rules.body: Any number that changes in place (countdown, dimensions readout) uses font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums so it never jitters.

rules.name: The Floats-Only Rule
rules.body: If an element doesn't float over another surface, it gets no shadow. Sibling separation is borders and background steps, never depth.

dos: Do use Focus Blue (#4f8ef7) for exactly one thing per surface: the primary action or the active state.
Do keep UI text at 11–13px in the system font; density is native, not cramped.
Do build transient surfaces from the glass material (#18181A at 85–92%) and windows from opaque native grays.
Do respect prefers-color-scheme on windowed surfaces (settings, history) and keep HUDs/editor always dark.
Do convey structure with hairline borders and background steps; reserve shadows for floating panels.
Do keep interactions instant; any future transition stays in the 150ms range, conveys state, and respects prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't introduce Electron-app heaviness: oversized paddings, web-styled controls, or window chrome that doesn't feel native.
Don't grow feature-bloat pro-tool chrome: no icon-crowded toolbars, ribbons, or option overload.
Don't add startup-SaaS styling: no gradients, badges, onboarding tours, or marketing polish inside the utility.
Don't use a second blue. #4a9eff is legacy; migrate to #4f8ef7 on contact.
Don't restyle native form controls or scrollbars.
Don't use red or green for anything but errors and confirmations respectively.
Don't add decorative motion, load choreography, or hover effects beyond a background-step change.
